reviews.comment:
Para entre 5 y 6 veces al año yendo a Calamuchita,  estiro hasta esta estación por la atención, hermoso parque para bajar tu mascota, BAÑOS RELIMPIOS Y COMPLETOSSSS! Y el bar en precios razonables

(Translated by Google)
Since I go to Calamuchita 5 or 6 times a year, I make sure to stop at this station because of the service, the beautiful park where you can let your pet out, the spotless and fully equipped restrooms! And the bar has reasonable prices.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/10277714820934344759/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNXcU9fZkNREAE
